## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SmithAI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and AI receptionist capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is developing a comprehensive content strategy to position Smith.ai as the authority on AI receptionists and related topics](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Smith.ai has a unique opportunity to own the SEO space for AI receptionist content due to their domain authority and technical expertise](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [The content strategy will target business owners curious about AI technology, not engineers or highly technical audiences](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1984.0)
  - [Smith.ai's AI receptionist capabilities are highly customizable, with human backup for complex tasks like scheduling](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1558.0)

## Topics

### Introduction of New Team Member

  - [Megan Dickey joined GrowthX, bringing 15 years of journalism experience](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Already contributed to securing a design firm for creating content templates](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Will support Elvis with content strategy and programmatic SEO efforts](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)

### Smith.ai's Market Position

  - [Opportunity to own SEO space for AI receptionists due to existing authority in virtual receptionist space](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [LLMs currently confusing virtual receptionists (VR) with AI receptionists, benefiting Smith.ai's search rankings](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Smith.ai has higher budget for content creation compared to small startup competitors](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)

### AI Receptionist Capabilities

  - [Highly customizable setup for each client, including qualification steps and data collection](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [Yellow Box Notes (YBN) system allows for specific overrides and customizations without complex product changes](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [Currently uses human agents for tasks like scheduling, with AI scheduling coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
  - [Ability to handle complex logic and customizations that competitors can't match](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)

### Content Strategy Approach

  - [Develop a glossary of terms to establish authority in the space](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Create content around topics like prompt engineering, AI agents, and call flow design](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Focus on being first to market with content, balancing speed and accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Target business owners who are technically curious but not engineers](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1984.0)
  - [Separate editorial content from programmatic SEO approach](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)

### Keyword and Topic Ideas

  - [Keywords like "prompt modification", "AI quality control", "call flow design", "conversational UX"](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
  - [Article idea: "AI receptionist is not a virtual receptionist - How they differ"](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=2784.0)
  - [Explore comparisons between voice providers (e.g. Eleven Labs vs Bappy)](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=2132.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [GrowthX to refine strategy and develop programmatic approach (prefix, suffix structure)](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1905.0)
  - [Aim to create content for 1-2 months initially, then scale up](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [Explore using demo call recordings or creating new ones to embed in content](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Elvis to present refined content strategy next week](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1905.0)
  - [Maddy to send ClickUp list with detailed use cases and examples](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
  - [Maddy to provide list of keyword themes and topics](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=2571.0)
  - [GrowthX to separate editorial content ideas from programmatic SEO approach](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
  - [Explore creating a custom GPT for content validation](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=2443.0)
  - [Begin creating high-priority content pieces, starting with AI vs VR receptionist comparison](https://fathom.video/share/9VfRouKGYTrYebAxz_8y5yZfQ9eujjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=2784.0)
